asMidiProcessor.description: Returns a typed MIDI processor reference (for setting attributes etc).

connectToMetronome.description: Connects this MIDI player to the given metronome.

connectToPanel.description: Connect this to the panel and it will be automatically updated when something changes.

convertEventListToNoteRectangles.description: Converts a given array of Message holders to a rectangle list.

create.signature: void create(int nominator, int denominator, int barLength)
create.description: Creates an empty sequence with the given length.

flushMessageList.description: Writes the given array of MessageHolder objects into the current sequence. This is undoable.

flushMessageListToSequence.description: Writes the given array of MessageHolder objects into the sequence with the given (one-based!) index. This is undoable.

getEventList.description: Creates an array containing all MIDI messages wrapped into MessageHolders for processing.

getEventListFromSequence.description: Creates an array containing all MIDI messages from the sequence with the given (one-based!) index into Message Holders.

getLastPlayedNotePosition.description: Returns the position of the last played note.

getMidiFileList.description: Returns a list of all MIDI files that are embedded in the plugin.

getNoteRectangleList.description: Returns an array containing all notes converted to the space supplied with the target bounds [x, y, w, h].

getNumSequences.description: Returns the number of loaded sequences.

getNumTracks.description: Returns the number of tracks in the current sequence.

getPlaybackPosition.description: Returns the playback position in the current loop between 0.0 and 1.0.

getPlayState.description: Returns the play state (0 = stop, 1 = play, 2 = recording.

getTicksPerQuarter.description: Returns the tick resolution for a quarter note.

getTimeSignature.description: Returns an object with properties about the length of the current sequence.

getTimeSignatureFromSequence.description: Returns an object with properties about the length of the sequence with the given index.

isEmpty.description: Checks if the MIDI player contains a sequence to read / write.

isSequenceEmpty.description: Returns true if the sequence with the given (one-based!) index doesn't contain any midi data.

play.description: Starts playing. Use the timestamp to delay the event or use the currents event timestamp for sample accurate playback.

record.description: Starts recording (not yet implemented). Use the timestamp to delay the event or use the currents event timestamp for sample accurate playback.

reset.description: Resets the current sequence to the last loaded file.

saveAsMidiFile.description: Saves the current sequence into the given file at the track position.

setAutomationHandlerConsumesControllerEv.description: This will send any CC messages from the MIDI file to the global MIDI handler.

setFile.signature: bool setFile(var fileName, bool clearExistingSequences, bool selectNewSequence)
setFile.description: Loads a MIDI file and switches to this sequence if specified.

setGlobalPlaybackRatio.description: Sets a global playback ratio (for all MIDI players).

setPlaybackCallback.description: Attaches a callback with two arguments (timestamp, playState) that gets executed when the play state changes.

setPlaybackPosition.description: Sets the playback position in the current loop. Input must be between 0.0 and 1.0.

setRecordEventCallback.description: Sets a inline function that will process every note that is about to be recorded.

setRepaintOnPositionChange.description:
If true, the panel will get a repaint() call whenever the playback position changes.
Otherwise it will only be updated when the sequence changes.

setSequence.description: Enables the (previously loaded) sequence with the given (one-based!) index.

setSequenceCallback.description: Attaches a callback that gets executed whenever the sequence was changed.

setSyncToMasterClock.description: Syncs the playback of this MIDI player to the master clock (external or internal).

setTimeSignature.description: Sets the timing information of the current sequence using the given object.

setTimeSignatureToSequence.description: Sets the timing information of the sequence with the given index using the given object.

setTrack.description: Sets the track index (starting with one).

setUseGlobalUndoManager.description: If enabled, it uses the global undo manager for all edits (So you can use Engine.undo()).

setUseTimestampInTicks.description: Uses Ticks instead of samples when editing the MIDI data.

stop.description: Starts playing. Use the timestamp to delay the event or use the currents event timestamp for sample accurate playback.
